channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside number 21 Brondesbury villas NW6 6AH, 17th March
item.description:
Damaged pavement trip hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken collapsed manhole cover in alleyway, 17th March
item.description:
From Crayford Road between Crayford Fish 'n Chip shop and Nail SQ shop there is a alleyway, the drain manhole cover has collapsed and broken leaving a hold in the alleyway, someone has put cones around it, you can navigate using my postcode DA14HA

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 181, Crayford Road, Crayford, Dartford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 17 aldershot road NW6 7LD, 17th March
item.description:
Damaged pavement trip hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in road, 17th March
item.description:
Lots of accumulated rubbish in the area where you park - Walsingham Walk, DA17 6LU. Been here for months. Unavoidable treading in it when getting in / out your car. Lots of large stones, glass rubbish (little glass bottles?) quite poorly lit at night, poses risk of injury where you cant see well at night. Could you please send road sweeps round to maintain the cleanliness of the communal area please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walsingham Walk, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 103 priory Park Road NW6 7UX, 17th March
item.description:
Damaged pavement trip hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal dumping in front garden of 4 Lee Street, 17th March
item.description:
Repeated fly-tipping is occurring directly in front of Flat 4. Individuals are throwing rubbish over the front boundary wall, leaving it beneath the bay window. As this is on private property, the waste is accumulating and not being collected.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lee Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A vast amount of branches etc cleared from a local garden and dumped, 17th March
item.description:
Gals up a large area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting graffiti sticker needs removing please, 17th March
item.description:
.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazard, 17th March
item.description:
I have reported this and you advised this does not exceed threshold, it is likely inspected when the paving slab was in position and not posing a risk. As soon as vehicles mount the kerb, the paving slab lifts and causes a trip hazard. I have to keep stamping on the slab on it is back in position and should not have to. I am concerned as someone may trip or especially a visually impaired person will not see this if left.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashcroft Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple mattresses and general household appliances dumped, 17th March
item.description:
Fly tipping of mattresses and appliances

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manaton Close, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous tree stump in school grounds opposite orchard avenue, 17th March
item.description:
Resident from School reporting there is a dangerous tree stump on the school grounds in the car park. The tree is leaning over over onto the school fence but it can easily in strong winds go over onto the pedestrian walkway and into the road. It is very dangerous. Please could someone look into this asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Avenue, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover missing on kerb outside corner shop, 17th March
item.description:
The manhole cover is missing leaving a large hole someone could step into. This has been missing for at least a week now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near to 202 Edington Road: black sack of rubbish., 17th March
item.description:
Black sack of rubbish on pavement at side of raisedbed has been there for over a week. Please also empty the green top wheeled bin which has obviously been dumped in the same position because it has the wrong rubbish in it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edington Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste bin not emptied in weeks, 17th March
item.description:
Dog waste bin at corner of green area has not been emptied in weeks. Waste piling up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Philip Walk, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge and broken recycling bin outside no 9, 17th March
item.description:
Fridge and broken recycling bin outside no 9

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Durban Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple deep potholes across entire road covering a 10-20m stretch, 17th March
item.description:
The road surface has completely broken up and it is impossible to drive along this stretch of road without falling into the potholes, some of which are quite deep. This is a busy road and a bus route and it needs to be fixed urgently before vehicles are damaged or there is a collision as drivers swerve to try and avoid the worst potholes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Summers Lane, Fallow Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 208 Edington Road: mattresses., 17th March
item.description:
Mattresses are at side of raisedbed opposite 208 Edington Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edington Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bridge, 17th March
item.description:
This was reported June 2025 and was cleaned but it is now covered again in graffiti
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheepcote Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 17th March
item.description:
These potholes have been here for months now , and dangerous to anyone crossing or entering the car park area . And when crossing to go to the pharmacy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-2, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water coming up from underneath slabs, 17th March
item.description:
Lots of plants growing from where the leak has been happening so long Does not look clean water. Could be dangerous for health It is right by the kids football cage And the little ones play ground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42-45, Glenfinlas Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
